◎简　　介  

　　It’s the final chapter of one of television’s greatest mystery series of all time. Recipient of 41 Primetime Emmy® Award and 16 Golden Globe® nominations, Murder, She Wrote set the standard with its fascinating characters, well-crafted plots and beloved heroine, mystery writer Jessica Fletcher. Reunite with acclaimed actress Angela Lansbury in her iconic role in all 24 episodes...
